info.description: REST API for AltMount — a WebDAV/NFS server backed by NZB/Usenet, with queue management, file health monitoring, and media streaming.
info.title: AltMount API

post.description: Triggers background registration of AltMount as a SABnzbd download client in all configured ARR instances
Tests the SABnzbd API connection from all configured ARR instances to AltMount

get.description: Returns health check results from all configured Radarr and Sonarr instances
Returns all configured Radarr/Sonarr instances from the configuration

post.description: Tests connectivity to a Radarr or Sonarr instance using the provided URL and API key

get.description: Returns a specific Radarr/Sonarr instance by its type and name
Returns statistics about configured Radarr and Sonarr instances

post.description: Receives webhooks from Radarr/Sonarr to trigger health checks; authenticated via API key query param or header
Triggers background registration of AltMount webhooks in all configured ARR instances

get.description: Returns whether login is required for accessing the API

post.description: Authenticates a user and sets a JWT cookie
Registers the first user (admin); registration is disabled once a user exists

get.description: Returns whether user registration is currently open (true only when no users exist)
Returns the full application configuration including providers (passwords redacted)

put.description: Replaces the entire application configuration and saves it to disk

post.description: Re-reads the configuration file from disk and applies the loaded configuration
Validates a configuration object without applying it, returning any validation errors

patch.description: Updates a specific section of the configuration (e.g. webdav, auth, health, rclone)

get.description: Returns a list of currently active file streams

delete.description: Terminates an active file stream by its ID

post.description: Exports all metadata files as NZB files packaged in a ZIP archive, excluding archives and AES-encrypted files
post.summary: Batch export NZB files as ZIP

get.description: Generates and downloads an NZB file from the metadata of a virtual filesystem file
Returns metadata for a file in the virtual filesystem by its path
Returns a history of recent file stream sessions

post.description: Force-unmounts the FUSE filesystem using platform-specific commands (use when graceful stop fails)
Mounts the NZB virtual filesystem at the specified path using FUSE

get.description: Returns the current status of the FUSE mount including health check results

post.description: Gracefully unmounts the FUSE filesystem

get.description: Returns a paginated list of file health records with optional filters

parameters.description: Filter by status (pending, checking, corrupted, repair_triggered, healthy)
parameters.name: status

parameters.description: Sort field (file_path, created_at, status, priority, last_checked, scheduled_check_at)
parameters.name: sort_by

parameters.description: Filter items updated since this timestamp (RFC3339)
parameters.name: since

post.description: Deletes multiple health records by file path in a single request (max 100)

parameters.description: List of file paths to delete
parameters.name: body

post.description: Triggers ARR rescan for multiple files to initiate repair (max 100)

parameters.description: List of file paths to repair
parameters.name: body

post.description: Resets multiple health check records back to pending status for reprocessing (max 100)

parameters.description: List of file paths to restart
parameters.name: body

post.description: Adds a file to the health check database for periodic checking
post.summary: Add file to health check queue

delete.description: Removes health records older than the specified time, optionally deleting physical files

parameters.description: Delete records older than this timestamp (RFC3339)
parameters.name: older_than

parameters.description: Also delete physical files from disk
parameters.name: delete_files

get.description: Returns a paginated list of files with corrupted health status

post.description: Stops any in-progress library synchronization
Simulates a library sync and returns what would be changed without applying changes

get.description: Returns whether a library sync is needed due to configuration changes such as mount path change
get.summary: Check if library sync is needed

post.description: Triggers a manual library synchronization to align metadata with the health database

get.description: Returns the current status of the library synchronization worker

post.description: Creates symlinks in the import directory for files without a library path (SYMLINK strategy only)
Resets all health records back to pending status for full re-checking

get.description: Returns aggregate statistics for all health records
Returns the current status and statistics of the background health check worker
Returns a single file health record by ID

delete.description: Deletes a health record by ID, cancelling any active check first

post.description: Cancels an in-progress health check for the specified file
Starts an immediate background health check for the specified file
Updates the priority of a health record to control processing order
Triggers an ARR rescan for the file to initiate repair, setting status to repair_triggered
Removes the masked status from a health record so it can be checked again
Adds a specific file path to the import queue; authenticated via API key query parameter

get.description: Returns a list of recently completed import operations

parameters.description: Maximum number of records to return (default 50)
parameters.name: limit

post.description: Starts an async import from an NzbDav SQLite database file (by path or upload)

parameters.description: Root folder path for imported files
parameters.name: rootFolder

parameters.description: Server-side path to SQLite database file
parameters.name: dbPath

parameters.description: SQLite database file upload (if dbPath not provided)
parameters.name: file

delete.description: Cancels any in-progress NzbDav import operation

post.description: Resets the NzbDav import status to allow starting a new import

get.description: Returns the current status of the NzbDav import operation

post.description: Starts a manual filesystem scan to discover and queue NZB files for import

get.description: Returns the current status of the filesystem scan process

post.description: Accepts a .nzb file upload, queues it with high priority, waits for processing to complete, and returns Stremio-compatible stream URLs for all media files. Authenticated via download_key (SHA256 of user API key). Caches results for re-use.
post.summary: Upload NZB and get stream URLs

parameters.description: SHA256 of the user API key
parameters.name: download_key

post.description: Adds a new NNTP provider to the configuration

put.description: Reorders the list of NNTP providers to set priority (first provider is highest priority)

post.description: Tests connectivity to an NNTP provider and returns the round-trip time

put.description: Updates the configuration of an existing NNTP provider by ID

delete.description: Removes an NNTP provider from the configuration by ID

get.description: Returns a paginated list of import queue items with optional filters

parameters.description: Filter by status (pending, processing, completed, failed)
parameters.name: status

parameters.description: Filter items updated since this timestamp (RFC3339)
parameters.name: since

delete.description: Deletes multiple queue items by ID in a single request

parameters.description: List of queue item IDs to delete
parameters.name: body

post.description: Requests cancellation for multiple queue items that are currently processing

parameters.description: List of queue item IDs to cancel
parameters.name: body

post.description: Resets multiple queue items back to pending status for reprocessing

parameters.description: List of queue item IDs to restart
parameters.name: body

delete.description: Removes all completed items from the queue
Removes all failed items from the queue
Removes all pending items from the queue

get.description: Server-Sent Events stream that pushes real-time progress updates for all queue items. On connect, sends the full current state as an "initial" event, then continues sending "update" events as items progress. Sends a keep-alive comment every 30 seconds.
Returns aggregate statistics for all queue items
Returns daily and hourly import statistics for the specified number of days

parameters.description: Number of days to retrieve (default 1, max 365)
parameters.name: days

post.description: Downloads a test NZB from sabnzbd.org and adds it to the queue
Uploads an NZB file and adds it to the import queue
Searches for an NZB by name via NZBLNK resolver and adds it to the queue
post.summary: Search and queue NZB by name

post.description: Resolves NZBLNK links and adds the resulting NZBs to the import queue

get.description: Returns a single import queue item by ID

delete.description: Deletes a queue item by ID (cannot delete items currently processing)

post.description: Cancels a queue item that is currently being processed

get.description: Downloads the original NZB file associated with a queue item
get.summary: Download NZB file for queue item

patch.description: Updates the priority of a queue item (1=high, 2=normal, 3=low)

post.description: Retries a pending, failed, or completed queue item

delete.description: Removes the RClone VFS cache directory and recreates it empty

post.description: Starts the RClone VFS mount

get.description: Returns the current status of the RClone mount

post.description: Stops the RClone VFS mount
Validates the RClone mount configuration without applying it
Tests connectivity to an external RClone RC server with the provided credentials

get.description: Lists files and directories at the given absolute path on the server filesystem

parameters.description: Absolute directory path to browse (defaults to working directory)
parameters.name: path

post.description: Removes old queue items and health records based on configurable age thresholds

parameters.description: Remove queue items older than this timestamp
parameters.name: queue_older_than

parameters.description: Remove health records older than this timestamp
parameters.name: health_older_than

get.description: Performs health checks on system components and returns overall health status
Returns real-time metrics for the NNTP connection pool including speeds, errors, and provider stats

post.description: Initiates a server restart; the response is returned before the restart occurs

get.description: Returns combined queue, health, and system statistics

post.description: Resets NNTP pool metrics, import history, and optionally queue items

parameters.description: Reset statistics for last N duration (e.g. 24h)
parameters.name: duration

parameters.description: Clear completed and failed queue items
parameters.name: reset_queue

post.description: Pulls the latest Docker image and restarts the server (requires Docker socket access)

get.description: Checks GitHub for a newer version and returns the current and latest version info
Returns profile information for the currently authenticated user

post.description: Generates a new API key for the authenticated user and returns it
Clears the JWT authentication cookie to log out the current user

put.description: Allows an authenticated user to change their password by providing the current password

post.description: Issues a new JWT token from the current valid token and sets it as a cookie

get.description: Returns the Stremio addon manifest JSON. Install by adding the manifest URL to Stremio. Key is the SHA256 hash of the user's API key (download_key).

Downloads the NZB from the given Prowlarr URL, adds it to the import queue with high priority, waits for processing, then 302-redirects to the first media stream URL. Used by Stremio after the user selects a stream from handleStremioAddonStream.
get.summary: Stremio play — queue NZB and redirect to stream

parameters.description: Safe filename title for the NZB
parameters.name: title

get.description: Searches Prowlarr for NZBs matching the given IMDB ID and returns Stremio stream objects with play URLs. Requires Prowlarr integration to be enabled. Filtering by language and quality is applied based on configuration.

parameters.description: Stremio content ID (e.g. tt1234567 or tt1234567:1:2)
parameters.name: id

movie.description: For upgrades/renames, the file path might be in other fields or need to be inferred

database_records_to_clean.description: Number of database records to clean

would_cleanup.description: Whether cleanup would occur based on config

percentage.description: Progress percentage (0-100), only for items being processed

x-enum-comments.HealthStatusCorrupted: File has missing segments or is corrupted
x-enum-comments.HealthStatusPending: File has not been checked yet
x-enum-comments.HealthStatusRepairTriggered: File repair has been triggered in Arrs

x-enum-comments.QueueStatusFallback: Sent to external SABnzbd as fallback

ApiKeyAuth.description: API key for programmatic access (available from GET /api/config)
ApiKeyAuth.name: apikey

BearerAuth.description: JWT token obtained from POST /api/auth/login. Format: "Bearer <token>"
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
